hero.title: Industrial Software & Automation Specialist
hero.intro: I combine industrial machine experience with software development, focusing on OPC UA, machine connectivity, diagnostics, monitoring workflows, sensors, and practical engineering tools for advanced manufacturing environments.

recruiterStats.title: Industrial + Software
recruiterStats.text: Practical machine-side experience combined with application development.

recruiterStats.title: OPC UA & Connectivity

recruiterStats.title: Germany-based
recruiterStats.text: Open to industrial software, automation and technical product roles.

about.title: About
about.html:
I am an engineer with interdisciplinary experience across industrial software, machine systems, additive manufacturing, optics, sensing, embedded-oriented environments, and technical diagnostics.

My strongest direction is the bridge between real industrial machine environments and user-facing software tools: machine connectivity, OPC UA, diagnostics, monitoring dashboards, service workflows, and quality-oriented engineering outputs.

I am interested in roles where industrial domain understanding, software implementation, structured problem solving, and technical communication are all valuable.

projects.title: Machine Connectivity / Monitoring Portfolio
projects.summary: A portfolio direction around industrial machine connectivity, diagnostics, monitoring architecture, and quality-oriented outputs.
projects.problem: Industrial users need clearer visibility into machine status, signals, diagnostics, and service-relevant information.
projects.solution: Structured the concept around machine tiles, connectivity, diagnostic views, OPC UA context, and output-oriented engineering workflows.

projects.title: Sensor Intelligence / Engineering Mode
projects.summary: A deeper technical project direction focused on signal interpretation, validation, uncertainty-aware thinking, calibration concepts, and sensor-driven engineering outputs.
projects.problem: Sensor and monitoring data are often hard to translate into clear engineering decisions.
projects.solution: Explored a structured engineering-mode approach connecting signal analysis, validation logic, uncertainty, simulation, and quality documentation concepts.

about.title: Über mich
about.html:
Ich bin ein Ingenieur mit interdisziplinärer Erfahrung in industrieller Software, Maschinensystemen, additiver Fertigung, Optik, Sensorik, embedded-nahen Umgebungen und technischer Diagnostik.

Mein stärkster Schwerpunkt ist die Verbindung zwischen realen industriellen Maschinenumgebungen und anwenderorientierten Softwaretools: Maschinenanbindung, OPC UA, Diagnostik, Monitoring-Dashboards, Service-Workflows und qualitätsorientierte Engineering-Ausgaben.

contact.availability: Offen für passende Rollen in industrieller Software, Automation und technischen Produkten.
